productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Calo Blue Flip Flops
description: Need to look stylish when you're hanging out by the pool this summer? Grab these flip flops from adidas in bright blue and black and enjoy the easy comfort of these hot weather essentials.UpperBlack padded synthetic straps in a thong-style shapeCutouts on one strap with blue backing and printed brandingComfortable and hardwearing blue foam footbedOutsoleLightweight, flexible outsole with texture and grooves to give good grip on wet surfacesFlip flop careUse a cloth to remove dust and dirt
